title: Minecraft Revitalized
description: Minecraft Revitalized brings new life into your world by enhancing every aspect of the game. With stunning visuals, new structures, new biomes, villages enhancements, fresh animations, better combat, wizardry, QOL features and more. Includes server mods.
body:
# REVITALIZED

A modpack based on the incredible [DB's Minecraft Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dbs-minecraft-plus) modpack from [ Disruptive Builds](https://www.youtube.com/@disruptivebuilds).

Minecraft Revitalized brings new life into your world by enhancing every aspect of the game. With stunning visuals, new structures, new biomes and fresh animations, the Minecraft world feels more alive than ever before. Villages become bustling hubs of activity with villagers that interact in richer ways and new threats from the Illagers.

Players can choose their own Origins (or not), unlocking unique abilities to shape their gameplay in unique ways. Fluid combat, wizardry and new archery mechanics ensure that every encounter feels  compelling. 

With Minecraft Revitalized, you’ll experience a more dynamic, visually captivating game where both survival and exploration are deeply enriched. Perfect for adventurers seeking to immerse themselves in a Revitalized vanilla feel with some QOL features.
_______________________________________________________________________

## Hosting a server with the modpack

**Server mods in the additional files** to add in the mods folder in your server (usually accessed from ftp)

**In the server.properties file** you might want to add more view distance to enjoy distance horizon (tank performances by quite a lot) > view-distance=32 (or 16)

**In the server.properties file** add these texts to the field in bold to enjoy fresh animations (no space) :
- require-resource-pack=true
- resource-pack=https://download.mc-packs.net/pack/ff18e6a762b87d7e8bad0726ac7d9c153306c6d2.zip
- resource-pack-sha1=ff18e6a762b87d7e8bad0726ac7d9c153306c6d2

Credits to all mods authors and : 
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
Colourful containers GUI: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui by Chris_XENO BurntToast_ Kingybu
